bundle.shortDescription: Fine-tune any AI, without fine-tuning. Local memory + persona + files for the model you choose.
bundle.longDescription: N0Tune is a context-tuning system. Bring any AI model (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, OpenRouter, Ollama, or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint) and N0Tune adds local memory, a persona profile, indexed files, a semantic cache, and a context compiler that builds a compact, personal prompt per request. Same model, personal answer. Works as a standalone Desktop app or as an integration layer for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex CLI via MCP. No fine-tuning, no telemetry, local-first.
